name: Zunera
tagline: Researching policing, security and social order in the Global South.
bio: Zunera is an Associate Professor at the University of Warwick working on criminology, law and socio-legal studies. Her research focuses on law enforcement, digitalisation, cybercrime, surveillance and urban (in)security, with a particular emphasis on South Asia and the Global South. She studied at SOAS and King's College London, and held postdoctoral and teaching positions at UCL.
